title: Origins Evolutions
description: Adds an evolution for some origins!
body:
**NOTICE: This mod was made for my modpack and server([join here](https://discord.gg/DXdf4Ku8ER)) so there is only one evolution at the moment but there are plans for more when i get the ideas for them! That aside this mod works completely fine in other modpacks so if you're interested feel free to add it to yours!**

### Make sure to download [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) otherwise this mod is useless!

### This mod adds:

- 1 evolution (so far)
- An orb of origin recipe 
- some food items!
- advancements for picking all of the base origins and when evolving

open an issue on the [github](https://github.com/bigmanmad/origin-evolutions) or dm me on discord for any suggestions: goremann
